# Core HTTP Entry

Use this map when the task is in the root Laravel app rather than a `Modules/*` package.

## Purpose

- Narrow first-pass reads for root routes, top-level controllers, and shared HTTP entry surfaces.
- Open [core-http-controllers.md](./core-http-controllers.md) next when the task is clearly controller-owned.

## Verified paths

### Routes

- [routes/web.php](../../routes/web.php) — main root web routes; includes [routes/install_r.php](../../routes/install_r.php)
- [routes/api.php](../../routes/api.php) — root API routes
- [routes/install_r.php](../../routes/install_r.php) — install/bootstrap route file pulled into `web.php`
- [routes/channels.php](../../routes/channels.php) — broadcast authorization hooks

### Controllers

- [app/Http/Controllers/](../../app/Http/Controllers/)
- [app/Http/Controllers/Auth/](../../app/Http/Controllers/Auth/)
- [app/Http/Controllers/Install/](../../app/Http/Controllers/Install/)
- [app/Http/Controllers/Restaurant/](../../app/Http/Controllers/Restaurant/)
